name: Mattermost Trello Bot
description: Integrates Mattermost with Trello via AI-powered bots that create and manage cards from chat threads.

settings_schema.header: Configure the Mattermost Trello Bot. Each bot maps to a specific Trello board and list. See the README for setup instructions.

settings.help_text: Your Anthropic API key (starting with sk-ant-...). Used by Claude to generate Trello card titles, descriptions, and checklists.

A JSON array mapping bot usernames to Trello boards. Each entry must include: botUsername, botDisplayName, trelloApiKey, trelloApiToken, trelloBoardId, trelloListId. Example: [{"botUsername": "therealpritish", "botDisplayName": "Pritish Bot", "trelloApiKey": "...", "trelloApiToken": "...", "trelloBoardId": "...", "trelloListId": "..."}]
